# Helm of Oryx
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Helm%20of%20Oryx&prop=wikitext

Helm of Oryx is a [https://rotfserver.wikia.com/wiki/Helms Ability for the Warrior] .

"''A Helm which once was owned by Oryx himself. It has recently been stolen by a group of Leechers''"

'''<u>Stats:</u>'''
* Party Effect: Within 10 squares Berserk for 7.5 seconds
* Party Effect: Within 2 sqrs Damaging for 4 seconds

* On Equip: +7 ATT +20 DEF +8 SPD +8 VIT +8 DEX
* MP Cost: 100
* Fame Bonus 7%
* Cooldown 7 seconds
It is Dropped by [[Oryx the Mad God 3]] after dealing 13% Damage to him.
